Brady Web SDK bundle
====================

Source: https://sdk.bradyid.com/bundle.js
Fetched: 2026-06-23

The npm package documented by Brady was unpublished when this integration was
implemented, so the kiosk vendors the official browser bundle served by Brady's
SDK demo site.

License/provenance notes:

- `bundle.js` references `bundle.js.LICENSE.txt`.
- Brady's CDN did not serve that sidecar at
  `https://sdk.bradyid.com/bundle.js.LICENSE.txt` when checked.
- This directory includes a local `bundle.js.LICENSE.txt` sidecar that records
  the bundle source and points to Brady's published SDK license page:
  https://sdk.bradyid.com/licences/
